rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 15, 2023 line 1. RESPONDENT DAVID JOHNSON, WINSTON ASHMEADE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is CONTINUED to April 12, 2023 for supplemental briefing to address whether this motion is moot in light of the filing of the first amended complaint. (State Compensation Ins. Fund v. Superior Court (2010) 184 Cal.App.4th 1124, 1131.) Moving party shall submit a supplemental brief, not to exceed two pages, no later than March 27, 2023, opposing party may respond (brief not to exceed two pages) by no later than April 3, 2023. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: BRETT MARTY ET AL VS. SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 15, 2023 line 3. PETITIONER KEK LIM Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. rulings.Case Title: CYNTHIA WILSON MARKHAM VS. ANGELO WILSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 15, 2023 line 4. PLAINTIFF CYNTHIA MARKHAM Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. The interests of justice and the rule of great liberality in allowing amendments prevail over the alleged prejudice that would be caused by a potential delay in trial. (Code Civ. Proc., 576; Board of Trustees v. Superior Court (2007) 149 Cal.App.4th 1154, 1163.) =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order And Request For Sanctions Against Jill B. Rowe For $3,105.00 (Ccp 2017.020[B])
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 15, 2023 line 5. Rowe For $3,105.00 (Ccp 2017.020[B]) is GRANTED in part, and DENIED in part. PLAINTIFF ANKIT SAHU, PURVI SAHU Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs' Request For Production Of Documents To Defendant Karena A. Sanctions granted in the amount of $650. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: 1440 SUTTER STREET, LLC VS. STEFANIE RISTICK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admissions Admitted, Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions Against Defendant Stefanie Ristick, Memorandum In Support Therof; Declaration Of Stephanie Andersen
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 15, 2023 line 9. PLAINTIFF 1440 SUTTER STREET, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admissions Admitted, Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions Against Defendant Stefanie Ristick is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Requests for Admissions, Set One, are deemed admitted. Defendant is ordered to provide full and complete answers without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order to (1) General Form Interrogatories, Set One; (2) UD Form Interrogatories, Set One; (3) Special Interrogatories, Set One; and (4) Requests for Production of Documents, Set One. Sanctions granted in the amount of $535. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
